name: 唐·康弗斯
introduction: I have performed on stage in dramas, comedies and musicals, including George in Big, the Musical, Amos in Big Fish, the Musical, Nevin in Music Between Us, as the voice of Big Brother in "1984", Bernard in Flight Plan, roles in Santa Fe Playhouse's Benchwarmers in the drama One More Coffee and the comedy Dinosaurs 2018 & 2019, Henry Ford in the courtroom drama False Witness 2019. I have also appeared in a series of funny Omega Mart commercials by Meow Wolf Studios in 2021, and most recently as Reverend Salvation in the musical The Cradle Will Rock 2021.In both 2020 & 2021 I performed in multiple Zoom plays including: Hunker Down, One More Coffee, Curious Smiles and Hunker Up. I worked as a cast member of the TV show Better Call Saul Season 6 Episode 12 which airs soon, featured BG in two feature films in 2021 and I will appear in two other short films and a feature film very soon.
